SourceProxy.name: SHYXRadiusNeighborCount
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Radius Neighbor Count

Documentation.short_help: Count points within a fixed radius of each point (parallel, VTK-only).

SourceProxy.Documentation: For every point, counts how many input points lie within the given search radius (Euclidean distance). The result is stored in point data as NeighborsInRadius (vtkIdTypeArray). The query point is included in its own count. Uses vtkStaticPointLocator and vtkSMPTools for parallel queries.
